[When the shoulders come into view (first), understand that
it is a 'head first' birth. When the ankles come into view (first),
understand that it is a 'feet first' birth. When the arms came
into view (first), understand that it is a 'hand first' birth] ·

10 Secrets o(Birth Time Rectification
The astrologers who use this sloka for birth time
determination interpret it as, "When the head comes out first,
the time at which the shoulders came out should be considered
as the birth time. When feet come out first, the time at which
the ankles come out should be considered as the birth time.
When the hands come out first, the time at which the arms
